text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Look at you, fluttering in the breeze... ♪ Teehee,
your leaves have really grown a lot. And you're so
big now.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Back again, Bright? No matter how many times
you come to look at them, those flowers won't
bloom until next month.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Why, hello, Air Groove. And I don't mind in the
slightest. ♪ You said the very same thing the last
time I was here, and I've not forgotten.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...I might have known that you'd want to watch
over that flowerbed from start to finish.
Apparently, it's going to rain soon, though, so do
come inside before it does.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Yes, yes. I shall be done with today's observation
before then.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Dober was right—your patience is
unrivaled. I imagine if that flower were a fawn lily,
you'd just as happily wait the seven or eight years
to see it bloom.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I imagine I would. For the beauty of its full
blossom would be worth the wait.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
And just as these flowers are blessed with a
wonderful steward in you, Air Groove, my dear
trainer watches over my own growth.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
My efforts will most definitely bear fruit in the
form of results this year. Even if an opponent
were to finish before me in one race, I would go
on to best them brilliantly in the next.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...I see. You've found quite a worthy caretaker,
then.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. One who is trustworthy and has the skill
to nurture any bud into a bright, noble flower. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some days later, Mejiro Bright informs me that
the flowerbed has bloomed and invites me to the
garden to see it with her.
